pages.text: $(l)Combat Effects:$()$(br)$(l)Explosion$() +2mp — AOE blast$(br)$(l)Piercing$() +1mp — Continue after hit$(br)$(l)Split$() +3mp — Splits into 3$(br)$(l)Homing$() +2mp — Auto-tracks$(br)$(l)Chain Lightning$() +3mp — Jumps to 3$(br)$(l)Multishot$() +4mp — Fires 3 spread$(br)$(l)Amplify$() +3mp — +50% damage$(br)$(l)Overload$() +4mp — 2x dmg, 25% self-harm$(br)$(l)Unstable$() +2mp — 30% crit, 20% misfire$(br)$(l)Shatter$() +3mp — Break shields+weaken

$(l)Support Effects:$()$(br)$(l)Healing$() +2mp — Heals allies$(br)$(l)Shield$() +1mp — Absorption hearts$(br)$(l)Lifesteal$() +3mp — 30% heals caster$(br)$(l)Absorb$() +3mp — 30% to absorption$(br)$(l)Devour$() +4mp — Kill grants temp HP$(br)$(l)Quickcast$() +2mp — -40% cooldown$(br)$(l)Summon Wisp$() +4mp — Flying wisp ally$(br)$(l)Summon Guardian$() +5mp — Armored guardian
